'''√w-m-th''' ('''kawamath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cutify|cutify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cutify|cutify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawamath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiwamath || jiwamath || shiwamath || kiwamath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuwamath || jujuwamath || shushuwamath || kukuwamath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuwamath || juwamath || shuwamath || kuwamath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuwamath || juwamath || shuwamath || kuwamath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thewamath || jewamath || shewamath || kewamath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothowamath || jojowamath || shoshowamath || kokowamath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thowamath || jowamath || showamath || kowamath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thowamath || jowamath || showamath || kowamath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wamath || wamath || wamath || wamath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wamath || wamath || wamath || wamath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wamath || wamath || wamath || wamath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wamath || wamath || wamath || wamath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæwamath || jæwamath || shæwamath || kæwamath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathawamath || jajawamath || shashawamath || kakawamath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thawamath || jawamath || shawamath || kawamath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thawamath || jawamath || shawamath || kawamath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shawamath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshawamath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishawamath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shawamathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshawamathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishawamathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shawamathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshawamathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishawamathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shawamathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshawamathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishawamathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shawamathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshawamathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishawamathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shawamathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshawamathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishawamathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shawamathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshawamathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishawamathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shawamathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshawamathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishawamathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shawamathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshawamathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishawamathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shawamathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshawamathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishawamathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shawamathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawamathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawamathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shawamathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshawamathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawamathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shawamathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshawamathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishawamathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shawamathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawamathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawamathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shawamathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshawamathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawamathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shawamathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshawamathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishawamathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shawamathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshawamathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishawamathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shawamathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshawamathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawamathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shawamathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshawamathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishawamathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shawamathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshawamathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishawamathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shawamathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawamathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawamathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
